9 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
10 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
11 #include <arcane/mesh/ParticleFamily.h>
12 // Interface du service
13 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/AccessorToolsMng/IMeshAccessorToolsMng.h"
14 
15 #include "IParticleMapping.h"
16 #include "ParticleMapping_axl.h"
17 
18 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/Mapping/ParticleToMeshMappingImpl/LocalParticleMapping.h"
19 #include "ArcGeoSim/Mesh/Mapping/ParticleToMeshMappingImpl/GlobalParticleMapping.h"
20 
21 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
22 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
23 
24 class ParticleMappingService: public ArcaneParticleMappingObject
25 {
26 public:
27 
29  ParticleMappingService(const Arcane::ServiceBuildInfo & sbi)
30  : ArcaneParticleMappingObject(sbi)
31  , m_family_name("Particle")
32  {
33  }
34 
36  ~ParticleMappingService()
37  {
38  }
39 
40 public:
42  void init(ArcGeoSim::IMeshAccessorToolsMng* mesh_accessor_tools_mng);
43 
45  IItemFamily* createParticleFamily(ConstArrayView<Int64> particle_uids,
46  ConstArrayView<Real3> particle_coords);
47 
49  IItemFamily* createParticleFamily(ConstArrayView<Int64> particle_uids,
50  ConstArrayView<Integer> cell_lids,
51  ConstArrayView<Real3> particle_coords);
53  void globalParticleMapping(ParticleVectorView particle_list);
54 
56  void localParticleMappingUpscale(ParticleVectorView particle_list);
57 
59  void localParticleMappingDownscale(ParticleVectorView particle_list);
60 
61 private:
63  ArcGeoSim::IMeshAccessorToolsMng* m_mesh_accessor_tools_mng = nullptr ;
65  std::unique_ptr<LocalParticleMapping> m_local_mapping ;
67  std::unique_ptr<VariableParticleReal3> m_particle_coords ;
68 
69  String m_family_name ;
70 
71  bool m_initialized = false ;
72 };
73 
74 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
75 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
76 void ParticleMappingService::init(ArcGeoSim::IMeshAccessorToolsMng* mesh_accessor_tools_mng)
77 {
78  m_mesh_accessor_tools_mng = mesh_accessor_tools_mng ;
79  m_family_name = options()->familyName() ;
80  m_initialized = true ;
81 }
82 
83 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
84 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
85 IItemFamily* ParticleMappingService::createParticleFamily(ConstArrayView<Int64> particle_uids,
86  ConstArrayView<Real3> particle_coords)
87 {
88  if(! m_initialized) fatal()<<"ParticleMappingService not initalized";
89  IItemFamily* i_item_family = mesh()->findItemFamily(IK_Particle,m_family_name, true);
90 
91  Int32SharedArray particle_lids(particle_uids.size());
92 
93  ParticleVectorView particles = i_item_family->toParticleFamily()->addParticles(particle_uids, particle_lids);
94 
95  i_item_family->endUpdate();
96 
97  m_particle_coords.reset(new VariableParticleReal3(VariableBuildInfo(mesh(), "ParticleCoord",m_family_name)));
98  m_particle_coords->setUsed(true);
99 
100  for (Integer i = 0, is = particle_lids.size(); i < is; i++)
101  {
102  const Particle& particle = particles[i].internal();
103  (*m_particle_coords)[particle] = particle_coords[i];
104  }
105 
106  return i_item_family;
107 }
108 
109 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
110 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
111 IItemFamily*
112 ParticleMappingService::createParticleFamily( ConstArrayView<Int64> particle_uids,
113  ConstArrayView<Integer> cell_lids,
114  ConstArrayView<Real3> particle_coords)
115 {
116  if(! m_initialized) fatal()<<"ParticleMappingService not initalized";
117 
118  IItemFamily* i_item_family = mesh()->findItemFamily(IK_Particle,m_family_name, true);
119 
120  Int32SharedArray particle_lids(particle_uids.size());
121 
122  ParticleVectorView particles = i_item_family->toParticleFamily()->addParticles(particle_uids,cell_lids,particle_lids);
123 
124  i_item_family->endUpdate();
125 
126  m_particle_coords.reset(new VariableParticleReal3(VariableBuildInfo(mesh(), "ParticleCoord", m_family_name)));
127  m_particle_coords->setUsed(true);
128 
129  for (Integer i = 0, is = particle_lids.size(); i < is; i++)
130  {
131  const Particle& particle = particles[i].internal();
132  (*m_particle_coords)[particle] = particle_coords[i];
133  }
134  return i_item_family;
135 }
136 
137 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
138 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
139 
140 void ParticleMappingService::globalParticleMapping(ParticleVectorView particle_list)
141 {
142  if(! m_initialized) fatal()<<"ParticleMappingService not initalized";
143  GlobalParticleMapping my_mapping(m_mesh_accessor_tools_mng);
144  if(options()->verbose())
145  my_mapping.setTraceManager(traceMng());
146  my_mapping.run(particle_list);
147 }
148 
149 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
150 
151 // Deraffinement, on prend le parent.
152 void ParticleMappingService::localParticleMappingUpscale(ParticleVectorView particle_list)
153 {
154  if(! m_initialized) fatal()<<"ParticleMappingService not initalized";
155  if(m_local_mapping.get()==nullptr)
156  m_local_mapping.reset(new LocalParticleMapping(m_mesh_accessor_tools_mng));
157  m_local_mapping->upscale(particle_list);
158 }
159 
160 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
161 
162 // Raffinement, on prend un enfant.
163 void ParticleMappingService::localParticleMappingDownscale(ParticleVectorView particle_list)
164 {
165  if(! m_initialized) fatal()<<"ParticleMappingService not initalized";
166  if(m_local_mapping.get()==nullptr)
167  m_local_mapping.reset(new LocalParticleMapping(m_mesh_accessor_tools_mng));
168  m_local_mapping->downscale(particle_list);
169 }
170 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
171 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
172 
173 using namespace Arcane;
174 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_PARTICLEMAPPING(ParticleMapping, ParticleMappingService);
